title: Wyoming celebrates 'nuclear renaissance' as feds approve license for a new reactor
description: Construction of an advanced nuclear power plant partly funded by the U.S. government -billed as the first of its kind this century, is now underway in Wyoming. The Bill Gates-backed company says its technology is proven but there are still hurdles to nuclear.

title: ‘Wrecking ball’ Ben Rice makes his case against lefties with big day at plate for Yankees
description: Ben Rice took another step Friday in proving his value in the big leagues.  At the start of the season, the Yankees were hesitant to use him against left-handed pitchers, often leaving the catcher-turned-first baseman out of the lineup.  However, he continued to make his case to the Yankees that he can be matched up...

title: Flash flooding kills at least one person in Texas
description: Flash flooding kills at least one person in Texas

title: Former Chiefs First-Round Pick Gets Bad News After NFL Draft
description: After three disappointing seasons, Kansas City Chiefs DE Felix Anudike-Uzomah received some disappointing news on his NFL future.

title: Lakers’ dominate Rockets in Game 6 victory, advancing in playoffs
description: The Lakers accomplished their goal, suffocating the Rockets’ offense to a permanent end of their season en route to a 98-78 victory in Game 6 of the best-of-seven series

title: The Papers:  'Burnham plans to return' and 'Four weeks from crunch'
description: Labour grandee Andy Burnham "plans to return to Westminster" and oil crunch looms lead Saturday's papers.

title: Dolphins' Malik Willis Roasted After Embarrassing First Pitch at Marlins Game
description: Miami Dolphins QB Malik Willis had a moment he wants to forget at Friday's Marlins-Phillies game.

title: Trump says US forces are ‘like pirates’ taking Iranian oil
description: Donald Trump says US forces are ‘like pirates’ taking over Iranian ships and cargo near the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Iran war protester speaks to Al Jazeera from top of Washington bridge
description: A 45-year old man is occupying the top of Washington’s Frederick Douglass Memorial Bridge to protest the war on Iran.

title: Havana slams new Trump sanctions as ‘collective punishment’ of Cuban people
description: The Cuban government has firmly rejected the recent sanctions levied by US President Donald Trump.

title: Ronny Mauricio’s late homer leads Mets past Angels for needed win to start May
description: Ronny Mauricio crushed a 1-1 fastball from Jose Fermin, with a 111.3 mph exit velocity, for his first homer this season.

title: Bill Maher drags Gavin Newsom for high-speed rail and sky-high gas in blistering interview
description: California Gov. Gavin Newsom walked into friendly territory — and still got hammered.

title: Protests may need to be stopped in some cases, PM suggests
description: The PM tells the BBC he is concerned about the "cumulative" effect of marches on the Jewish community.

title: 'I bought a baseball cap to hide my kippah': Jews observe first Shabbat after Golders Green attack
description: British Jews tell the BBC they are agonising over whether to stick to their usual routine this Sabbath.

title: 'If we sleep they bite': Rats and weasels infest camps for displaced Gazans
description: In the Gaza Strip, the daily battles are now with rats, weasels, and other pests spreading diseases.

title: These twins were born within minutes of each other - but have different dads
description: Lavinia and Michelle are the only case of twins with different fathers to be recorded in the UK.

title: Irate Domino’s delivery driver runs over ‘f–king rude’ customer who stiffed him on a tip: cops
description: The irate pizza courier was captured on surveillance video blasting the victim and a witness for being "f—king rude" after they dodged the gratuity, causing tempers to flare, police said.
